query:

  email LIKE '%@gmail.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@hotmail.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@yahoo.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@outlook.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@live.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@icloud.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@aol.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@msn.%' OR

  email LIKE '%@optusnet.%' OR

  email LIKE '%@internode.%' OR
  email LIKE '%@westnet.%' OR
